description_long: This is a traditional-style street food kiosk with a rich brown color and ornate yellow-gold patterned trim, reminiscent of Southeast Asian architecture. The kiosk features a prominent gabled roof with decorative finials and two small statues on top, as well as wide overhanging eaves that provide shelter to the front and sides. The front counter is open for serving, with a sign reading 'CEND'ALL' above the main service area, and several black round stools are arranged in front for customers. The structure appears to be made primarily of wood, with some metal elements such as the wheel and support frame, and the interior contains cooking or serving equipment. The kiosk is compact and mobile, with a single large wheel visible on one side, suggesting it can be pushed or moved. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban sidewalks or parks.
description: A traditional brown street food kiosk with a gabled roof, ornate yellow trim, and a front serving counter, accompanied by several black stools. The kiosk features decorative roof elements and a prominent sign, evoking Southeast Asian architectural influences.
description_view_0: Oblique view showing the ornate gabled roof, patterned trim, open front counter, and several stools arranged in front and to the side.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the 'CEND'ALL' sign, open serving area, two roof statues, and a full row of stools facing the kiosk.
description_view_2: Rear oblique view showing the back of the kiosk, the patterned roof, and the arrangement of stools on the opposite side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back panel of the kiosk, the two roof statues, and fewer visible stools, with the serving area less prominent.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign with the text 'CEND'ALL' on the front roof panel, integrated into the structure above the serving counter.
attribute_roof_design: Gabled roof with overhanging eaves, ornate patterned trim, decorative finials, and two small statues on top; appears to be made of wood with patterned fabric or painted panels.
attribute_architectural_style: Traditional Southeast Asian with decorative motifs and gabled roof.
